title: 宿敵現る！ワガママ王女との場外乱闘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we've come to a cafe to film the TV show
Kawakami Princess was approached about after
the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...There's not a single customer in sight. It's like a
ghost town!

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Good to see you again! Thank you for agreeing to
take part.

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
As mentioned in the materials I sent you, today's
show will be held in a discussion format. I've
reserved the whole cafe so we can really explore
your appeal as a racer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
S-so I have the whole cafe to myself?! How
princessly!

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We made sure to pick the perfect
conversation partner to join you, so I'm sure the
program will turn out great!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text: Thanks for tuning in to today's episode of Meet the Racers! Our guests today are...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hello! I'm Kawakami Princess! Should I stand in
the middle?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Obviously not!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
After all, today's main star is me: Magical Girl
Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're my discussion partner?! R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(It's Sweep Tosho. She's the Umamusume who won
the Queen Elizabeth II Cup that Kawakami
Princess and I watched together.)

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. You're both the stars of our
program. ♪

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
To kick things off: Sweep Tosho! As the Shuka
Sho marvel, do you have any advice for
Kawakami Princess?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nope!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Why should I give advice to some hooligan
princess who's way in over her head?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
W-wha... How dare you call a princess a
hooligan?! Who taught you such a word?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's none of your beeswax, Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're not getting any advice from me. Not even
if you drop to your knees and cry! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...!
Ohhh. I seeeee.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Sweep. I've realized why you're being
mean to me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The truth is... you don't even have any advice that could help me, do you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm already far too powerful, after all, and poor
losers only know how to criticize... I understand
your frustration, I really do.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! Don't you look down on me!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
P-please, you two! Let's get a hold of ourselves,
shall we?! Umm... On to our next segment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm standing beside the TV producer and
watching the program from off camera, when...

text_block_list.name: Lady Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Who are those two? They're bickering without a
sliver of dignity.

text_block_list.name: Lady Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's the magical girl and the savage
Umamusume. Remember what the savage one did
at the Japanese Oaks?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Kawakami and Sweep's furious exchange
can be heard even outside the cafe. Passersby are
beginning to peer inside with puzzled expressions.
choice_data_list: ...Are you sure this will be okay?

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Yes, there's no problem. If there's anything you
want cut, just let us know. But I'm personally fine
with it as is!

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to capture a natural conversation
between the two of them. Aren't they both so
strong and fascinating?

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume don't need glitz or glamour to shine
in the Tiara tour. That's the message I want to
convey to our viewers.
choice_data_list: What makes you feel that way?

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's a little embarrassing, but my friend's
daughter is an Umamusume. She always wanted to
enter the Tiara tour, but before she could...

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
She gave up because she didn't think she was
glamorous enough. Her friends in elementary
school told her the Tiara wouldn't suit her.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what that's even supposed to mean.
But I guess it was profound enough to steal away
the courage she needed to pursue her dream.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I'm really mad now! Listen up, precious
princess! You'd better enter the Queen Elizabeth
II Cup this year!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was already planning on it! And you know
what I'm also planning on? Strolling into first
place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's no way I'll lose, so I hope you're
prepared to fall to the ground crying!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who'll be crying! On the day of the
race, you'll get a taste of my most powerful
magic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their squabbling shows no signs of dying down,
and in the end, Kawakami doesn't get any advice
for the Shuka Sho. However...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami and Sweep
text_block_list.text: Let's settle this at the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the episode hits the air, the vigorous
exchange between the two racers becomes a big
hit among viewers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, I'm watching a recording of the
program when...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I've got some fan letters here for
Kawakami Princess.
choice_data_list:
Thanks for going out of your way to bring them
here!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it. I had some documents I needed
to give you anyway, so I thought I'd do it all at
once.

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text: "Let's settle this at the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!"

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, is this that TV program from the other day?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They're both so wonderful and full of energy.
Hehe, maybe that's why there are so many fan
letters coming in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After checking the documents regarding the
Shuka Sho, I open the paper bag containing
Kawakami Princess's fan letters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I check through them to make sure there aren't
any letters for other Umamusume mixed in by
mistake, I spot an envelope that reads...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, it's not even a one-off. Several of
the fan letters are addressed to both of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open one up to read, yet all that's written inside
is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You're the worst."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! ...Oh? Why do you look so
flustered?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Are you hiding something from me? Oh my.
Whatever could it be, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon, you should know that a princess is
very perceptive! I'll have to pretend I didn't see
anything. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You actually prepared a surprise present for when
I win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. ♪ That's my
trainer—so considerate. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my surprise at Kawakami Princess' sudden
entrance, I panicked and hid the letters from
her...
choice_data_list:
(I wonder if the other letters say the same
thing...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hate to invade her privacy, but I want to check
the rest of the letters before handing them over. I
pack the bag deep into a cardboard box.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be a pro athlete, but she's also still a
sensitive young teenager. At times like this, I
have a duty as an adult to protect her.
